Home Make a Submission?

Do-Ahead Mashed Potatoes

Janet Caldwell & Jeanne Marrs

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield:

Ingredients

  • 4 lbs potatoes
  • 8 oz cream cheese
  • 1 stick butter
  • 1 cup sour cream
  • salt and pepper to taste
  • 1/2 tsp garlic powder
  • 1/2 tsp paprika
  • 1/4 cup chives

Directions

  1. Boil and mash potatoes.
  2. Add rest of ingredients Mix together
  3. Bake at 350-degrees 1/2 hour if potatoes are warm
  4. If cold: 1 - 1 1/2 hours.
  5. Can make a day ahead.
